detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HOKUSAI.openTrading() (HOKUSAI.sol#549-575):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (HOKUSAI.sol#559)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HOKUSAI.sol#561)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HOKUSAI.sol#561)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (HOKUSAI.sol#571)
	HOKUSAI.tradingOpen (HOKUSAI.sol#265) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOKUSAI.openTrading() (HOKUSAI.sol#549-575)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HOKUSAI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (HOKUSAI.sol#423-479):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (HOKUSAI.sol#463)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (HOKUSAI.sol#493-505)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (HOKUSAI.sol#469)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (HOKUSAI.sol#543)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (HOKUSAI.sol#477)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (HOKUSAI.sol#631)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (HOKUSAI.sol#611)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (HOKUSAI.sol#613)
	HOKUSAI._rOwned (HOKUSAI.sol#225) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOKUSAI._takeTeam(uint256) (HOKUSAI.sol#625-633)
	- HOKUSAI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (HOKUSAI.sol#607-621)
	- HOKUSAI.balanceOf(address) (HOKUSAI.sol#341-345)
	- HOKUSAI.constructor() (HOKUSAI.sol#291-305)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (HOKUSAI.sol#477)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (HOKUSAI.sol#639)
	HOKUSAI._rTotal (HOKUSAI.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOKUSAI._getCurrentSupply() (HOKUSAI.sol#731-741)
	- HOKUSAI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (HOKUSAI.sol#637-643)
	- HOKUSAI.constructor() (HOKUSAI.sol#291-305)
	- HOKUSAI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (HOKUSAI.sol#397-405)
